channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Saturday, March 28
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 03:09 PM (1.155 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 07:50 AM (-0.293 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: NW 10 mph
